title: cicerbita muralis
intro: Cicerbita muralis, also known as the prickly lettuce or Spanish lettuce, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and digestive benefits. The plant's leaves and roots are used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids, sesquiterpene lactones, and other compounds. Cicerbita muralis can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or taken as a tincture, offering potential health benefits and relief from various ailments.
